title: Key Management on ODBC
text: Key Management on ODBC See the DBMS documentation for rules for primary and candidate keys. Uniface uses unique indexes for primary and candidate keys. Uniface uses duplicate indexes for all other keys The key is created when the table is created, either ‘on the fly’ or using scripts generated by the Create Table facility. The SQL statement is issued from within the create table statement. Key names are constructed using the table name. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
